message:
fix(abi): migrate socket_abi.rs to raw syscalls

Migrates all 18 libc::syscall calls to native raw syscalls:
- sys_socket, sys_bind, sys_listen, sys_accept, sys_accept4
- sys_connect, sys_shutdown, sys_setsockopt, sys_getsockopt
- sys_getpeername, sys_getsockname, sys_socketpair
- sys_sendto, sys_recvfrom, sys_sendmsg, sys_recvmsg

Adds 12 new socket syscall constants and wrappers
to frankenlibc-core for both x86_64 and aarch64.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
